overall.description: First-person perspective walk through a rainy cyberpunk city street at night, featuring neon-lit storefronts, digital billboards, and futuristic architecture. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 with cinematic lighting and wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with digital advertising screens

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk under the elevated highway, observing passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving past on the wet multi-lane street
green sports car speeding by with headlights on

entered.detail: large array of digital advertising screens suspended under the highway overpass displaying various advertisements
massive concrete overpass with metal support beams covering the street above
distinctive orange textured pavement with geometric diamond patterns running the length of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive elevated highway structure with large digital billboards overhead. The camera walks forward along the distinctive orange textured sidewalk while vehicles pass by on the wet street to the left. The atmosphere is hazy with artificial neon lighting reflecting off the rain-slicked surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with parking garage entrance and neon-lit storefronts

events.description: passing the illuminated red NO ENTRY sign marking a parking garage entrance
pedestrian density increases with several people walking on the sidewalk in both directions

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past the parking entrance, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in green jacket walking toward the camera
person in camouflage jacket walking in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: illuminated red NO ENTRY sign with arrow above a parking garage entrance
dark entrance to underground parking with metal grate and concrete walls
storefront with bright pink and yellow neon border lighting and illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under a NO ENTRY sign for a parking garage and emerges from under the overpass into a more open street section. Pedestrian activity increases with people walking in both directions, and neon-lit storefronts become visible on the right side of the orange sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with vertical billboards and various storefronts

events.description: camera briefly tilts upward to view the tall vertical billboards overhead
pedestrian with purple umbrella crosses the sidewalk from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking past various storefronts and looking up at the towering vertical advertisements

notable_agents.action: woman in white top and shorts standing near a storefront entrance
person carrying a purple umbrella crossing the street

entered.detail: tall structure with multiple stacked digital advertisement screens extending high above the street
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: Walking along the commercial stretch, the camera passes a building covered in graffiti and views a tall vertical billboard tower. The sidewalk remains busy with pedestrians, including someone with a distinctive purple umbrella crossing the path. Various neon signs and storefronts line the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection with distinctive glass-roofed building and heavy green neon lighting

events.description: intense green neon light from storefront illuminates the sidewalk and approaching pedestrians
distinctive glass-roofed building becomes prominent at the end of the street

agents.ego_description: walking toward the distinctive building at the street end, passing pedestrians with umbrellas in the green-lit area

notable_agents.action: woman with red hair and white skirt walking past the camera
group of people with black umbrellas walking toward the glass building

entered.detail: futuristic building with angular glass and metal roof structure visible at the street end
storefront bathed in bright cyan-green neon light with intense digital signage
small futuristic structure with blue and white checkered pattern and glowing windows

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a distinctive glass-roofed building at the street end, bathed in intense green neon light from a storefront on the right. The camera passes several pedestrians with umbrellas and futuristic street furniture, with the angular architecture of the destination building becoming more prominent as the distance closes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk from the oppressive shadow of a massive overpass into a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins beneath an elevated highway where large digital billboards loom overhead and artificial light reflects off a rain-slicked orange sidewalk. As the camera passes under a parking garage sign and emerges from the overpass, the environment opens up into a bustling street filled with pedestrians and glowing storefronts. The scene then shifts along a commercial stretch past graffiti-covered walls and a towering vertical billboard, weaving through crowds including a person with a purple umbrella. Finally, the path leads toward a glass-roofed building at the end of the street, where the atmosphere becomes saturated in intense green neon light.
